DISCOVERY 612, APPEARANCES: GREGORY K. JUNG, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, SARONI SUGAR & RICE, INC. MARCUS MERCHASIN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY. TENTATIVE RULING---DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEPOSITION QUESTIONS -- HEARING REQUIRED. THE ORDER THAT WILL BE ISSUED WILL REQUIRE FURTHER MEET AND CONFER. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT THERE IS A BASIS FOR ORDERING THIS WITNESS TO RESPOND TO QUESTIONS TO WHICH HE HAS RESPONDED THAT HE DOES NOT KNOW THE INFORMATION. THE COURT WILL ISSUE A PROTECTIVE ORDER, BUT DOES NOT FIND GOOD CAUSE TO INCLUDE AN "ATTORNEYS EYES ONLY" PROVISION. LATE OPPOSITION HAS BEEN CONSIDERED. MATTER ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. COURT APPROVES PROTECTIVE ORDER EXCEPT THAT IT MUST BE MODIFIED AS TO PARAGRAPH 16 TO INCLUDE CRC 243.1 ET SEQ. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
